findings.issue: The core project self-awareness mechanism, `memory/swarm/code-index.json`, reports '0 modules and 0 endpoints'. This contradicts the `CODE-INDEX SUMMARY` which indicates 1041 indexed files. The builder script `packages/swarm/archive/code_index.py` is in an archived directory, suggesting it is no longer actively building the index. This constitutes an invisible blind spot, preventing Atlas from accurate self-reflection and decision-making, akin to a cultural memory loss.
findings.recommended_fix: Relocate `code_index.py` from `archive/` to an active `packages/swarm/` directory. Re-integrate its execution into the automated build process (e.g., CI/CD workflow) to ensure `memory/swarm/code-index.json` is consistently and correctly populated. This re-establishes a foundational trust signal in the system's self-knowledge.
